title: Raised Durability Bar
description: A compatibility fix for Durability Bar with Raised.
body:
# Raised Durability Bar This pack fixes the issue of the Durability Bar being misaligned when Raised is active. ## ♻️ **Compatibility** **Like the mod, Raised Durability Bar is compatible with all Resource Packs with the appropriate tweaks.** Durability Bar can be tweaked to your heart's desire by editing `durability_bar.png`, which should be located under `assets/durabilitybar/textures/gui/durability_bar.png`. The bar cannot be any wider than it currently is, however, it is freely adjustable [vertically]. ❗❗ For custom compatibility with Raised, you'll need to move the entirety of `durability_bar.png` up by 2 pixels. ✔️ Durability Bar supports less-than-opaque opacity. ## 🤝 **Credits**
  • intwined for the idea
  • Tiviacz1337 for creating Durability Bar
  • yurisuika for creating Raised
## ⚖️ **Rights** ✔️ **You are welcome to use this pack in your modpack. You are allowed to edit the texture included as desired so long as the pack is not redistributed under the same name externally** ❌ **You are NOT permitted to redistribute this pack under the same name externally.**
